task: Fix LLM Tool Hallucinations via Misleading Schema
outcome: Success. Removed unused attributes (actionType, payload, target) from the execute_system_command tool definition, forcing the LLM to directly bind and call native MCP tools instead of wrapping them inside bash/powershell strings.
patterns: Providing generic keys like 'actionType: API_CALL' to a local system shell tool confuses the LLM into believing that standard shell execution arrays are universal meta-executors.

corrections.proposed_fix: Purged actionType, target, and payload from executionNodes.ts Zod schema schema and appended standard text telling it not to fallback to shell commands forcefully.
